summary: Iteration 6 frontend-only validation: AdvisoryBoard (Dr. Sidra Azmat Butt) section, navbar 'Advisory' link (desktop + mobile), and /memo Section III update all verified. All required strings, testids, and section ordering (About → Advisory → Contact) present. No console errors/warnings on /, scrolling to #advisory, or navigating to /memo. Mobile (390x844) renders cleanly with single-column stacking. Iteration-5 admin testids (admin-login-root, admin-login-form, admin-token-input, admin-login-submit) still resolve. Backend testing skipped per request.
critical_code_review_comments: AdvisoryBoard.jsx is clean, dark neobrutalist aesthetic matches existing sections. Advisor card uses lg:grid-cols-12 which collapses to single-column at <lg breakpoints (verified visually at 390px).

shared.jsx NAV_LINKS update correctly drives both desktop nav-link-advisory and mobile-nav-link-advisory testids via the existing .map() — no Navbar changes were needed and none made, good DRY discipline.

StrategicMemo.jsx Section III: the Sidra paragraph is well-anchored with white-highlighted spans for 'Dr. Sidra Azmat Butt' and 'Head of Algorithmic Validation' — visually consistent with Levi/Jeremy paragraphs.
Minor: 'lg:grid-cols-1' on the outer ADVISORS map wrapper is a no-op (default is 1 col); could be removed for clarity but harmless.
Minor: ADVISORS array has only one entry — current single-advisor design is fine; if a second advisor is added, the layout already supports it via the .map().
test_credentials: N/A — no auth flows tested in this iteration; ADMIN_TOKEN intentionally empty (fail-closed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 validated: Advisory section, navbar links (desktop+mobile), /memo Section III paragraph all confirmed via Playwright using textContent (note: inner_text returns CSS-uppercased role text, so use evaluate+textContent for case-sensitive checks on the 'Head of Algorithmic Validation' substring). All iter1–iter5 testids regression-verified (founder-ceo, founder-cto, about-section, contact, admin-login-root). Backend untouched this iteration; iteration_5 backend results still authoritative.
